prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A large form letter template in the center with a prominent blank space labeled "<T>" in a golden highlighted box. On the left, a hand writes "string" into the blank, producing a completed letter with string-specific content below. On the right, another hand writes "number" into a copy of the same template, producing number-specific content. Multiple completed letters fan out at the bottom, each customized but all sharing the same template structure. The T blank glows to show it is the key variable piece.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
